test_frameworks.name: pytest (shared)
test_frameworks.scope: Python DDL analysis tests in tests/unit/. Run via: cd lib && uv run pytest

test_frameworks.name: pytest (ddl-mcp)
test_frameworks.scope: MCP DDL server tests in mcp/ddl/tests/. Run via: cd mcp/ddl && uv run pytest

applications.name: ad-migration plugin
applications.description: DDL analysis and migration pipeline. Three sub-plugins: bootstrap, migration, ground-truth-harness. Loaded via: claude --plugin-dir plugins/

plugin_marketplace.description: Plugin marketplace manifest defining 3 sub-plugins: bootstrap, migration, ground-truth-harness. Each plugin has a 'source' key pointing to its workbench directory.

plugin_bootstrap.description: Bootstrap sub-plugin. Commands: commands/init-ad-migration.md (prerequisite checker and installer), commands/init-dbt.md (dbt project scaffolding with adapter selection and sources.yml generation). Skills: skills/setup-ddl/ (DDL extraction from live SQL Server with catalog signals, DMF references, and AST enrichment).

plugin_migration.description: Migration sub-plugin. Contains skills, agents, and commands for the migration workflow.

plugin_ground_truth_harness.description: Ground-truth harness sub-plugin. Commands: commands/setup-sandbox.md (create throwaway sandbox DB by cloning schema from source SQL Server), commands/teardown-sandbox.md (drop sandbox DB).

sandbox_backends.description: Technology-specific sandbox backends for test harness. base.py: abstract SandboxBackend interface. sql_server.py: pyodbc-based SQL Server sandbox lifecycle (schema cloning via SELECT INTO, proc cloning via OBJECT_DEFINITION, scenario execution).

shared_python.description: Python library for DDL analysis. Modules: loader.py (DDL parsing, sqlglot AST, GO-delimited block splitting), loader_data.py (data structures for parsed DDL entries), loader_io.py (DDL file I/O), loader_parse.py (sqlglot parse wrappers), discover.py (catalog-mandatory list/show/refs CLI), init.py (migration project scaffolding — CLAUDE.md, README.md, repo-map.json, .gitignore, .envrc, .githooks), catalog.py (catalog JSON I/O, routing flags, DMF row processing, flip_references), catalog_dmf.py (write_catalog_files orchestration), catalog_enrich.py (offline AST enrichment CLI — BFS call graph, SELECT INTO/TRUNCATE detection), setup_ddl.py (DDL setup orchestration), migrate.py (migration context assembly + dbt artifact writer CLI), profile.py (profiling context assembly + write-back CLI), test_harness.py (sandbox lifecycle CLI — reads manifest, routes to technology-specific backend), env_config.py (git-repo assertion, project-root/dbt-path/ddl-dir/catalog-dir resolution with env-var overrides), dmf_processing.py (DMF row processing helpers), sql_types.py (SQL type mappings), name_resolver.py (FQN normalization).

shared_schemas.description: JSON Schema files (18 total). Catalog schemas: table_catalog, procedure_catalog, view_catalog, function_catalog, manifest. Agent I/O: scoping_summary, profiler_input, test_generator_input, model_generator_input, fixture_manifest, migration_artifact_manifest, profile_context. Test harness: test_harness_execute_output, test_spec_output. Discover CLI output: discover_list_output, discover_show_output, discover_refs_output. Shared defs: common.json.

ddl_mcp.description: MCP server for structured DDL parsing. server.py exposes list_tables, get_table_schema, list_procedures, get_procedure_body, get_dependencies, list_views, get_view_body, list_functions, get_function_body.

mssql_mcp.description: genai-toolbox config for live SQL Server queries. tools.yaml defines mssql-execute-sql tool.

migration_skills.description: Skill definitions: discover-objects/ (DDL exploration — list/show/refs from catalog; show for tables includes full scoping flow with writer discovery and catalog persistence), generate-model/ (dbt model generation from stored procedures), profile-table/ (interactive single-table profiling with approval gates). setup-ddl is in the bootstrap sub-plugin.

migration_agents.description: Agent definitions: scoping-agent.md (catalog-based writer detection via discover refs, writes scoping results to catalog and produces scoping_summary), model-generator-agent.md (batch dbt model generation from stored procedures), profiler-agent.md (batch profiling — context assembly, LLM reasoning, catalog write-back).

migration_commands.description: Top-level orchestrator commands: migrate-table/ (end-to-end single-table migration pipeline — discover, profile, migrate, test-gen, validate).

tests_migration.description: Python pytest suite: test_discover.py, test_catalog.py, test_catalog_enrich.py, test_extract_refs.py, test_setup_ddl.py, test_init.py, test_smoke.py, test_migrate.py, test_profile.py, test_env_config.py, test_test_harness.py. Fixtures: ddl/, ddl_unparseable/, discover/flat/ (with catalog/ subdirectory), discover/unparseable/, catalog/ (table and procedure JSON fixtures), migrate/ (DDL, catalog with procedures/tables, dbt project fixture, manifest.json), profile/ (DDL, catalog with procedures/tables, manifest.json), test_harness/ (manifest.json for sandbox tests), sql/ (Docker SQL Server setup scripts).

tests_evals.description: Promptfoo eval harness for non-interactive agent and skill testing against MigrationTest schema. Three packages: scoping (8 scenarios x skill + agent), profiler (4 scenarios), model-generator (4 scenarios). Run via: cd tests/evals && npx promptfoo eval. See docs/design/eval-harness/README.md.

tests_ddl_mcp.description: Python pytest suite for the DDL MCP server. test_server.py tests all MCP tool handlers (list_tables, get_table_schema, list_procedures, get_procedure_body, get_dependencies, list_views, get_view_body, list_functions, get_function_body).

scripts.description: Developer scripts: setup-worktree.sh, publish-test-db-image.sh, restore-dw-samples.sh, build-dacpac-extract.sh, sql/ (test DB creation scripts and JSON fixtures).

docs.description: Documentation. Sub-directories: design/ (agent-contract, cli-design, eval-harness, overall-design, setup-ddl, test-scenario, tsql-parse-classification), reference/ (agent-instructions-governance, local-agent-testing, running-tests, setup-docker, test-db-image), requirements/.

key_directories.plugins/: Claude Code plugin workbenches (bootstrap + migration + ground-truth-harness sub-plugins) with marketplace manifest
key_directories.lib/: Python DDL analysis library (uv project, sqlglot-based)
key_directories.lib/shared/schemas/: JSON Schema files for catalog, agent I/O, discover CLI output, and shared definitions
key_directories.tests/unit/: Python pytest tests for shared library (discover, catalog, catalog_enrich, extract_refs, integration)
key_directories.tests/evals/: Promptfoo eval harness for agent and skill testing (scoping, profiler, model-generator packages)
key_directories.mcp/ddl/tests/: Python pytest tests for the DDL MCP server
key_directories.docs/design/: Architecture decision records and design specs
key_directories..claude/rules/: Shared agent rules (4 policy files: coding-conventions, git-workflow, logging-policy, codex-execution-policy)
key_directories..claude/skills/: Workflow playbooks for Claude Code CLI skills (5 skills)

commands.test_migration_python_integration: cd lib && uv run pytest -m integration

conventions.commits: Granular — one concern per commit. Stage specific files (git add <file>, not git add .).

notes_for_agents.startup: Read this file before exploring code. It is the primary startup context for structure, entrypoints, modules, and commands.
notes_for_agents.plugin_loading: Load the ad-migration plugin with: claude --plugin-dir plugins/ CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT points to the active sub-plugin root (e.g. plugins/bootstrap/ or plugins/migration/).
notes_for_agents.ddl_filenames: The loader auto-detects object types from CREATE statements — .sql filenames are not significant. Any directory of .sql files works.
notes_for_agents.catalog_mandatory: discover.py requires catalog/ files from setup-ddl. Errors if catalog is missing. No AST fallback.
notes_for_agents.parse_errors: sqlglot parse failures are hard errors (DdlParseError). The loader does not silently skip unparseable DDL.
notes_for_agents.python_tests: Two pytest suites: (1) shared lib — cd lib && uv run pytest; integration tests: uv run pytest -m integration. (2) DDL MCP server — cd mcp/ddl && uv run pytest.
notes_for_agents.mssql_env_vars: Live SQL Server access requires MSSQL_HOST, MSSQL_PORT, MSSQL_DB, SA_PASSWORD exported before launching claude.
notes_for_agents.update_repo_map: Refresh this file whenever you change architecture, entrypoints, commands, modules, or package structure.
